item.text: I’ll execute turn 006 with the same constraints. The board position is behind on supply, so I’m prioritizing killing exposed P1 units while using the scout’s mobility to claim `center-southeast`.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-006.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-006.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-006.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-006.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-006.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-006.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"peddler\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"village\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
    if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
      cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
      bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"
    fi
  fi
fi

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":8}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-006\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":8}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
  fi
fi

SUMMARY="P2 used Peddler to keep the engine moving, bought economy where legal, then claimed southeast and focused exposed P1 units."
REASONING="Peddler is the only engine action in hand and adds draw, action, and money. Gold is the preferred buy if affordable; otherwise the fallback keeps the turn legal. On board, P2 needs to reduce P1'"'s center lead, so the scout uses mobility to take center-southeast and finish the wounded scout while guardian and marksman combine into the central raider if ranges allow.\"

COMMIT_LOG="'$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents'"\\|terminalWinEvents\" \""'$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
def extract(label):
    i=log.find(label)
    if i<0: return None
    j=log.find('[', i)
    if j<0: return None
    depth=0
    for k in range(j, len(log)):
        if log[k]=='[': depth+=1
        elif log[k]==']':
            depth-=1
            if depth==0:
                return json.loads(log[j:k+1])
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    arr=extract(label)
    if arr is not None:
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-006.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-006.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('RATIONALE Peddler preserves engine tempo and the Gold buy strengthens future turns. Scout mobility claims center-southeast and finishes the weakened scout; guardian and marksman concentrate damage on the central raider to reduce P1 board control.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-006`.

Deck line: Peddler, move to buy, buy Gold, end turn.

Board line: scout moved to `(8,7)` and finished `P1-scout-start-2`; guardian moved to `(5,5)` and attacked `P1-raider-start-3`; marksman moved to `(6,7)` and also attacked `P1-raider-start-3`.

Rationale: Peddler keeps the engine moving and enables another Gold buy. The scout claims `center-southeast` while removing P1’s wounded scout, and the guardian plus marksman focus damage into the central raider to cut into P1’s board control.
